name: C2 Beaconing Pattern Detection
description: Detects regular interval network beaconing indicative of C2 implant communication
query:
// Detect C2 beaconing by regular interval connections
// Trigger on repeated connections with consistent timing to same destination
events from ndr_flow
where protocol = "TCP"
  and destination_port = 443
  and bytes_sent < 5000
group by source_ip, destination_ip
having count(*) > 30
within 1800 seconds
